sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Social Security's 2.5% Cost-of-Living Adjustment  ( COLA )  for 2025 Was Disappointing. Will 2026 Be Any Better?
feed.summary: The first Social Security checks with 2025's 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment ( COLA ) have gone out, with more coming in the following weeks. The average retired worker will now receive $1,976 per month, up from $1,927 last year.
